title: woof brainstorm bundle (Stage-0 ingestion)
description: Front-matter of the resolved design document produced by the interactive `woof-brainstorm` skill (its Contract 2). The skill writes the bundle into the epic's discovery/brainstorm/ bucket; `woof validate --schema brainstorm <bundle>` checks it against this schema and the graph re-validates it as a Stage-1 discovery source. The schema is a woof-local copy of the agent-toolkit brainstorm skill's bundle.schema.json so Woof stays standalone; keep the two in step. work_units[] is discovery guidance for Woof's synthesis and breakdown prompts, not a mechanical story mapping.

tier.description: How much of the tiered template the design engaged. The single sizing axis; there is no separate mode (kb-topic is the light/non-software case).

status.description: accepted: grilled and approved for handoff. rejected: Loop 2 found a root flaw and the design returned to Loop 1 (the back-edge); the graph refuses to ingest a rejected bundle.

context_ref.description: Path to CONTEXT.md, the bundle's ubiquitous-language glossary.

adr_refs.description: Paths to ADR files recorded during Loop 2.

work_units.description: Consumer-agnostic decomposition guidance. Woof ingests these as discovery source material and re-derives work units through synthesis, definition, and breakdown; may be empty for a kb-topic bundle.

bounded_context.description: The bounded context or module seam this unit belongs to, named as in the design and CONTEXT.md.
